caption: The video captures a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs and a necklace featuring a red pendant. The man is playing a guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is either giving a musical performance or conducting a lesson. The audience, consisting of children with their backs to the camera, appears attentive and engaged. The background features wooden blinds covering large windows, adding a warm and cozy atmosphere to the scene. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the organization or event.
